title: Enterprise Suite
metaDescription: Enterprise-grade platforma. Multi-tenant, RBAC z 8+ rolami, audit trail, compliance RODO i SOC2, SLA 99.9%. Od 89 000 PLN, gotowa w 8 tygodni.
name: Enterprise Suite
shortDescription: Multi-tenant, RBAC, compliance, audit trail, SLA.

primary.title: SUITE.
primary.subtitle: Dla organizacji 200+ osób, gdzie compliance officer pyta o SOC2, CISO wymaga pentestingu, CFO chce audit trail do każdej transakcji > 10k PLN. Multi-tenant z hard data isolation (Postgres schemas), RBAC 8+ ról, penetration testing, SLA 99.9% z on-call rotation, RODO + SOC2 ready.

primary.title: Enterprise
primary.body:
Twoja dotychczasowa infrastruktura to WordPress z 14 pluginami security. Compliance officer zapytał o RODO — nie wiesz po co zaczęło. Tester penetracyjny znalazł 23 vulnerability. CFO chce widoku na każdą transakcję > 10 tys zł — Excel z ręcznym loggingiem to nie compliance.

Enterprise Suite to architektura zaprojektowana od podstaw pod wymagania regulacyjne. Multi-tenant — każdy tenant to odseparowana Postgres schema (nie logical partitioning z ryzykiem data leaks), own database encryption keys, own IP whitelisting rules, complete data isolation at the database level. Klient A nigdy nie widzi danych klienta B, nawet w logach.

RBAC z 8+ rolami (Owner, Admin, Manager, Analyst, Approver, Viewer, Finance Officer, Compliance Officer) i granularnymi uprawnieniami na poziomie feature (canEditContent, canPublish, canDeletePages, canViewFinancials, canExport). Każda akcja — login, data change, export — tworzy wpis w immutable audit trail (user, role, action, timestamp, IP, geolocation, device fingerprint). Historyczne dane są read-only.

Compliance RODO: Data subject access request (DSAR) — system automatycznie generuje export wszystkich danych o danej osobie. Right to erasure — GDPR-compliant deletion (soft-delete z flag'iem, hard-delete po 90 dniach, retention policies per data type). Consent management — każdy klient ma dashboard do zarządzania consentem. RODO audit trail w osobnym immutable log.

SOC2 Type II readiness: penetration testing (quarterly), vulnerability scanning (weekly), incident response playbook, change management process, business continuity plan (backup/disaster recovery), employee training (security awareness). Datadog + Sentry monitoring 24/7 (error tracking, performance, security events). On-call rotation — średni response time 15 minut dla P1 incidents.

SLA 99.9% (max 43 min/miesiąc downtime) z redundancy na multi-region deployment. Database replication (PostgreSQL streaming), load balancing (autoscaling), CDN dla assets (Cloudinary). Failover testing co miesiąc. Incident timeline — każdy outage to post-mortem raport z root cause analysis.

To dla healthcare (HIPAA-adjacent), fintech (PSD2, RODO), edtech (data student protection) — organizacji gdzie compliance to taki sam wymóg jak CPU/memory. Dla kogoś z audytami PwC/Deloitte co rok.

items.title: Multi-tenant architecture
items.description: Hard data isolation via Postgres schemas (not logical partitioning), per-tenant encryption keys, separate database permissions, complete query-level isolation, tenant-aware middleware.

items.title: RBAC z 8+ rolami
items.description: 8 roles + granular permissions (canEditContent, canPublish, canDeletePages, canExport), MFA required, session timeout (15 min idle), IP whitelisting, device trust policy, passwordless login option.

items.title: Audit trail + logging
items.description: Immutable audit log (user, role, action, timestamp, IP, geolocation, device fingerprint), retention policies per data type, searchable by date/actor/action, export to SIEM systems (Splunk/ELK), forensics-ready.

items.title: Compliance RODO + SOC2
items.description: DSAR automation (data subject access requests), right to erasure (soft/hard delete policies), consent management dashboard, SOC2 Type II audit-ready, penetration testing reports, incident response playbook, employee training.

items.title: SLA 99.9% + monitoring
items.description: Multi-region redundancy, database replication, auto-scaling load balancing, Datadog/Sentry monitoring, 24/7 on-call (avg response 15 min P1), monthly failover testing, post-mortem after each incident.

items.title: Discovery + requirements
items.description: Mapowanie wymagań biznesowych, regulacyjnych i technicznych.

items.title: Security architecture
items.description: Projekt multi-tenant, RBAC, audit trail, compliance framework.

items.title: Dev sprints (4)
items.description: Auth + tenants → core features → compliance → integrations.

items.title: Compliance audit
items.description: Weryfikacja RODO, testy penetracyjne, security review.

items.title: Staging
items.description: Environment staging, load testing, failover testing.

items.title: Production
items.description: Deploy, monitoring setup, SLA activation, handover.

primary.title: POTRZEBUJESZ
primary.description: Rozmowa z naszym architektem + Twoim CISO/compliance officer. Mapujemy regulatory requirements (RODO, SOC2, PSD2, branżowe), security architecture, penetration testing scope, timeline. Wszystko dokumentujemy w compliance roadmap.
